title: clusia stenophylla
intro: Clusia stenophylla, also known as the 'Cabeça de Ovelha' or 'Ewe's Head', is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, belonging to the Clusiaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Clusia stenophylla include the potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and even aid in the treatment of certain types of cancer. Herbal preparations of Clusia stenophylla typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures made from the plant's leaves or roots, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
